content: The phone just connected. The agent is greeting you.
Hi there, I need to get a refill on my blood pressure medication — I'm running low on my lisinopril 10mg that Dr. Ross prescribed.
The agent said: Recorded for quality and training purposes.
Okay, that's fine with me.
The agent said: Orthopedics, part of pretty good AI. Am I speaking with Sarah?
No, I'm calling about my medication refill — is this the right office for Dr. Ross's patients?
The agent said: This is the right office for Dr. Rosses patients, are you calling to request a medication refill for yourself, or for someone else?
Yes, it's for me — I need a refill on my lisinopril 10mg that Dr. Ross prescribed.
The agent said: Please provide your date of birth.
August 3rd, 1972.
The agent said: Could you please spell your first? And last name for me just to make sure I have it, right? I have your date of birth as August 3rd, 1972.
Sure — it's James, J-A-M-E-S, and Carter, C-A-R-T-E-R.
The agent said: Would you like me to look up your record using your phone number?
Yeah, that works — it's 650-555-0198.
The agent said: By the number you have, please tell me the phone number. You have a file with us.
My phone number is 650-555-0198.
The agent said: I have your phone number is 650-555-0198 and your date of birth is August 3rd, 1972.
That's correct.
The agent said: I can't proceed further right now but I can make sure our Clinic support team follows up with you, please hold while I document your request for a medication refill with Dr. Ross
Okay, sounds good — thank you.
The agent said: I'll connect you to our patient support team so they can help with your medication. Refill, please stay on the line, connecting you to a representative
Thanks, I appreciate it.
The agent said: Hello, you've reached the pretty good. AI test line, goodbye.
Okay, thanks for your help. Goodbye.
